channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th June
item.description:
28day with Standard tm with fway closure please cut overgrown vegetation back to boundary approx 1.5m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 19th June
item.description:
15DB ENWD with road closure CW abrupt level 1000x300x80mm temp repair (CW6 Abrupt Level Differences )
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People living in van, 19th June
item.description:
Hi, this van has been parked in this location for 5-6 weeks now with occupants living in it. I spoke to them and they said they’d broken down, i looked at the vans engine and it looks like they have made it look like they are working on it. I suggested a solution of how to fix it but they just ignored me. I then went to cross the brook with my dog and i slipped and fell in human waste (see pic) They are clearly living there, dumping propane bottles in the bushes, cooking and a friend has also witnessed them and their friends playing loud music on an evening. I have been down there again the other day to see even more human waste beside the river, another friend has seen the guy washing naked in the brook as well. I have reported the issue to the police, however they have not gotten back to me yet, this incident number is; GC 20260507-0223 I have had to change my dog walking/ running route because of this. I feel it is an environment / health issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Runnings, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inconvenient parking, 19th June
item.description:
There has been a large commercial van parked opposite the entrance to Orchard Park in Hayden Rd making it unsafe to pull in & out of the junction. the exact location is What 3 words (Closer.sofa.chemistry) The van has been parked there for 6 weeks now without movement. I reported it to the police about 5 weeks ago, however they have not got back to me yet, the incident number is; GC 20260507-0223. The van is parked in contravention to the highway code being that is parked opposite within 10m of a junction and also parked facing the flow of traffic, so at night oncoming vehicles cannot see any rear reflectors.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public right of way signs keep getting ripped of, public right of way not sign posted or cleared. Gates keep being locked., 19th June
item.description:
Gate for public right of way into St Georges Church Yard from the tithe barn centre. Public right of way obstructed. It is supposed to go through and onto the new estate. Signs keep being removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springmead Avenue, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 19th June
item.description:
Gully cleaning took place this morning, but Parton Road (by Beechgarth GL3 2JH) was left out
Report on FixMyStreet
